instructions.instruction: Server is authoritative for all game state — never apply client-provided positions, scores, or authority flags directly
instructions.original_snippets: Server is authoritative for all game state...NEVER trust client position or score updates directly...Clients are untrusted and can be modified for cheating.
instructions.relevant_when: implementing message handlers that update player state (move, attack, score)

instructions.instruction: Validate movement delta on server with clamping (e.g. Math.max/min) — never accept absolute positions from client
instructions.original_snippets: const dx = Math.max(-5, Math.min(5, payload.dx)); // clamp server-side...player.x += dx;
instructions.relevant_when: implementing a move or position-update message handler

instructions.instruction: Use @type decorator on every Schema field that must be synchronized to clients — never use plain class properties for gameplay-critical values
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER mutate non-Schema fields expecting automatic sync...Only Schema-decorated fields are synchronized to clients...@type('number') hp: number = 100; // decorated — synced automatically
instructions.relevant_when: designing player or game state Schema classes

instructions.instruction: Use MapSchema<Player> keyed by client.sessionId for per-player state
instructions.original_snippets: @type({ map: Player }) players = new MapSchema<Player>()...player.sessionId = client.sessionId; this.state.players.set(client.sessionId, player);
instructions.relevant_when: creating a room with multiple players

instructions.instruction: Implement all four lifecycle hooks: onCreate, onJoin, onLeave, onDispose
instructions.original_snippets: Implement room lifecycle hooks (onCreate, onJoin, onLeave, onDrop)...lifecycle sequence: onCreate → onAuth → onJoin → onDrop → onLeave → onDispose

instructions.instruction: In onLeave, check the consented flag — for non-consented disconnect, call allowReconnection(client, timeout) before removing player; only remove on timeout expiry
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER skip reconnection handling for transient disconnects...async onLeave(client: Client, consented: boolean) { if (!consented) { const reconnection = await this.allowReconnection(client, 20); if (!reconnection) { this.state.players.delete(client.sessionId); } } else { this.state.players.delete(client.sessionId); } }
instructions.relevant_when: implementing onLeave or designing a room for mobile/unstable network clients

instructions.instruction: Use bounded reconnection timeouts: 20-30 seconds for casual, 10-15 seconds for ranked, strict for tournament
instructions.original_snippets: Casual match: 20-30 seconds grace. Ranked match: 10-15 seconds grace. Tournament: strict policy with admin override.
instructions.relevant_when: setting the timeout value in allowReconnection for different game modes

instructions.instruction: Set room metadata in onCreate for mode, region, and skill filters
instructions.original_snippets: Set room metadata in onCreate for mode/region/skill filters...Keep metadata consistent with room runtime state.

instructions.instruction: Guard privileged messages (startMatch, kickPlayer, etc.) by verifying role or ownership before executing — never allow any client to trigger admin actions
instructions.original_snippets: NEVER expose privileged room messages to all clients...Admin or host-only actions must be authorization-gated...if (client.sessionId !== this.hostSessionId) return; // guard
instructions.relevant_when: implementing host/admin message handlers in a room with role-based actions

instructions.instruction: Parse message payloads with schema validation (e.g. Zod safeParse) before using the data
instructions.original_snippets: Parse payload with schema validation (for example Zod)...const parsed = moveSchema.safeParse(payload); if (!parsed.success) return;
instructions.relevant_when: writing onMessage handlers that accept structured payloads

instructions.instruction: Enforce gameplay constraints (cooldowns, ranges, turn order) on the server after payload validation
instructions.original_snippets: Enforce gameplay constraints (cooldowns, ranges, turn order)...Apply validated mutation to server state.
instructions.relevant_when: implementing game mechanics like attack, turn-based moves, or time-gated actions

instructions.instruction: Rate-limit spam-prone message types on the server
instructions.relevant_when: implementing high-frequency message handlers like move or fire

instructions.instruction: Keep non-synced operational details (timers, internal flags) outside gameplay Schema state
instructions.original_snippets: Keep non-synced operational details outside gameplay state.
instructions.relevant_when: designing room or player state classes

instructions.instruction: After allowReconnection timeout, mark player as disconnected in onDrop and expire/remove them if timeout passes
instructions.original_snippets: In onDrop, mark player as disconnected. Allow reconnection for a bounded timeout. Expire and remove player if timeout passes.
instructions.relevant_when: implementing onDrop or reconnection handling logic

instructions.instruction: Verify schema sync with a test client at the checkpoint step — confirm field changes propagate and no plain properties are used for game-critical state
instructions.original_snippets: Checkpoint: Verify schema sync with a test client before proceeding — confirm field changes propagate and no plain properties are used for game-critical state.
instructions.relevant_when: implementing and reviewing any Schema-based state design
